text:
No lights need be displayed upon a vehicle which is:

(a) Parked off the roadway and not in a hazardous position on the highway; or

(b) Parked with a wheel within 18 inches of a curb; or

(c) Parked within a business or residence district with a wheel within 18 inches of a curb or edge of the roadway.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 2. Lighting Equipment [24250 - 26106]
#### Article 4. Parking Lamps [24800 - 24802]
##### § 24802

No lights need be displayed upon a vehicle which is:

(a) Parked off the roadway and not in a hazardous position on the highway; or

(b) Parked with a wheel within 18 inches of a curb; or

(c) Parked within a business or residence district with a wheel within 18 inches of a curb or edge of the roadway.

*(Amended by Stats. 1977, Ch. 620.)*
